steps.title: Apply the multiplier from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $16x+8 = 4 \cdot 12 = 48$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Multiplying both sides of the given equation by $4$ yields $\left(4\right)\left(4x+2\right)=\left(4\right)\left(12\right)$, or $16x+8=48$. Therefore, the value of $16x+8$ is $48$.
